Lorimi Bacoor Faith Family

Happy Father's Day,
Pastors!

scroll down ↓
“
For you know that we dealt with each of you as a father deals with his own children, encouraging, comforting, and urging you to live lives worthy of God.
1 Thessalonians 2:11–12

A pastor is more than a title it's a calling to love a church the way a father loves his children, patiently, faithfully, and without giving up to us! Today, on Father's Day, the Lorimi Bacoor Faith Family wants to thank you to the two men of being a good shepherd and spiritual father to us!

With Honor & Gratitude

Our Shepherds

Sancho Jr Guinanao

Pastor

Thank you for the years of being a faithful leader to us, a good shepherd and being a spiritual father to us! Happy Father's Day Pastor Sancho!

Ramon P. Comia

Pastor

Thank you for the years of being also a faithful leader to us a good shepherd and being a spiritual father to us! Happy Father's Day Pastor Ramon!

A Word From Your Church Family

Dear to our beloved Pastors!

Thank you for all the sacrifice! the love that never ran out, and the discipline and correction that you gave us even though it hurts but you made us realize that in God's love through the discipline and correction we will grow even more!

You two have been a spiritual father and a good shepherd to our church family! May the Lord who called you continue to strengthen you, the way you have so faithfully strengthened us.

With love and gratitude,
Your Lorimi Bacoor Faith Family.
A Greeting

To my beloved Pastors, happy Father's Day! Thank you for shepherding us with a father's heart! for every word of wisdom, every prayers and every moment you chose to guide me in the right path! I am Blessed and grateful the two of you today and always.

— Danmark S. Rosalejos

Happy Father's Day!

To the men who shepherd us like a father shepherds his children, thank you, today and always.
